services.name: KBC Zagreb
services.notes: Public university hospital, full emergency services, some English-speaking staff

services.name: Ljekarna Mandić
services.notes: Well-stocked pharmacy, prescription medications, some English spoken

services.name: Konzum
services.notes: Largest supermarket chain, wide selection, some imported goods

services.name: Zagrebačka banka
services.notes: Largest Croatian bank (UniCredit group), ATMs, some English support

services.name: Dom Zdravlja Zagreb
services.notes: Public health center, GP services, some English-speaking doctors

services.name: Dental Clinic Zagreb Center
services.notes: General and cosmetic dentistry, some English-speaking dentists, modern equipment

services.name: Veterinary Clinic Zagreb
services.notes: Full veterinary services, vaccinations, surgery, some English spoken

services.name: Parque Canino / Dog Park Zagreb
services.notes: Off-leash area, green space popular with dog owners, water available

services.name: Fitness Center Gym
services.notes: Modern gym with cardio and weight equipment, group classes, monthly memberships

services.name: International Church of Zagreb
services.notes: English-language services, expat community gathering point, social events

services.name: Franjo Tuđman Airport (ZAG)
services.notes: International airport with domestic and international flights

services.name: ZET / City Transit Zagreb
services.notes: Trams, buses, and ferry services, affordable public transit

services.name: Impact Hub Zagreb
services.notes: Coworking space, high-speed internet, meeting rooms, community events

services.name: Pet Grooming Zagreb
services.notes: Professional pet grooming services, bathing, clipping, appointment recommended

services.name: InterNations Zagreb Expat Community
services.notes: International expat community center, social events, networking, relocation assistance

services.name: Lidl
services.notes: German discount grocer — widespread in Croatia.

services.name: Links Shop
services.notes: Electronics retailer with online + physical stores.

attractions.name: Zagreb Cultural Center
attractions.description: Cultural center with local art, history, and community events

attractions.name: Zagreb Central Park / Garden
attractions.description: Main public park with walking trails, gardens, and green space

attractions.name: Zagreb Restaurant District
attractions.description: Walkable area with diverse restaurants, cafes, and bars
